commands.title: Create TUN/TAP Interface on Kali
commands.template: sudo ip tuntap add user $(whoami) mode tun ligolo
commands.description: Creates a new TUN/TAP interface named 'ligolo' on Kali.

commands.title: Bring Up the Ligolo Interface
commands.template: sudo ip link set ligolo up

commands.title: Start Ligolo Proxy on Kali
commands.description: Starts Ligolo proxy on Kali with a self-signed certificate for secure tunneling.

commands.title: Connect Ligolo Agent on Remote System
commands.description: Starts Ligolo agent on the remote system connecting back to Kali's proxy.

commands.title: Add Route to Internal Network on Kali
commands.template: sudo ip route add {first_pivot_subnet} dev ligolo
commands.description: Adds a route for the internal subnet through the 'ligolo' interface to access the internal network.

commands.title: Start Ligolo Service
commands.description: Starts Ligolo to begin tunneling and enable pivoting.

commands.title: Create Second TUN Interface for Double Pivot
commands.template: sudo ip tuntap add user $(whoami) mode tun pivot-double
commands.description: Creates a second TUN/TAP interface on Kali for double pivoting.

commands.title: Activate Second Pivot Interface
commands.template: sudo ip link set pivot-double up
commands.description: Brings up the second tunnel interface on Kali.

commands.title: Create Listener on Ligolo
commands.description: Forwards traffic from the external system to the internal proxy port.

commands.title: Connect Agent on Second Network
commands.description: Starts Ligolo agent on the second pivot system connecting back to the first pivot.

commands.title: Start Tunnel for Second Pivot
commands.description: Starts Ligolo tunnel for the second pivot connection.

commands.title: Add Route for Second Pivot Target
commands.template: sudo ip route add {second_pivot_subnet} dev pivot-double
commands.description: Adds route to second-level internal target via the second tunnel interface.

commands.title: Access Services Bound to Localhost on Second Pivot
commands.template: sudo ip route add 240.0.0.1/32 dev pivot-double
commands.description: Used to scan or interact with services bound to 127.0.0.1 on the final target using 240.0.0.1 through Ligolo.
